positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic, leaping arctic fox amidst stylized geometric mountain peaks and crescent moons. The composition is highly symmetrical and centrally framed, with the fox rendered in clean, bold silhouettes of cool blues, sapphire, and snowy whites, contrasting sharply against deep midnight navy and charcoal. Include subtle, abstract constellation patterns and stylized bioluminescent foliage scattered lightly in the foreground. The overall aesthetic is modern folklore mixed with Art Deco precision, suitable for apparel printing. Clean lines, graphic novel quality, high contrast, perfect for single-color screen printing style.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, graffiti, cartoon, photorealism, 3d render, overcomplicated, busy background
